title: Auto-Drink Ominous Bottles
description: A tiny Fabric mod to AFK raid farms again.
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_I've missed AFKing raid farms as of 1.21. So, I learned the bare minimum in the world of Java and mod-making, and had ChatGPT (GPT-5) help me make this._

</details>



**This mod automatically drinks an Ominous Bottle when you complete a raid.**

- Keybind togglable (R by default).
- Pulls bottles from inventory when none are found in your hotbar.
- Prioritizes available bottles by Omen level.
